_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: MCXboxBroadcast
author: panel@rtm516.co.uk
description: Show a server on the friends tab in Minecraft for easier connection to remote servers

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
# MCXboxBroadcast install script.
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
apk update && apk add curl
cd /mnt/server
curl -L -o ${SERVER_JARFILE} https://github.com/MCXboxBroadcast/Broadcaster/releases/latest/download/MCXboxBroadcastStandalone.jar

variables.name: Jar File
variables.description: The name of the jarfile to be used when downloading & running.
